# PERF-214 positive: cache key includes volatile fields
lang: go
file: PERF-214-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"sync"
)

type Entry struct {
	ID string
}

func Render(entry Entry, y int) int {
	var cache sync.Map
	key := fmt.Sprintf("%p-%d", &entry, y)
	if v, ok := cache.Load(key); ok {
		return v.(int)
	}
	cache.Store(key, len(entry.ID))
	return len(entry.ID)
}
